buckets.name: Evolution Ladders
buckets.note: Tiered progression tracks whose badge art escalates rung by rung -- the backbone of the Athenaeum. Each track is one concept, many rungs, one long journey: common at the foot, legendary at the crown.

buckets.name: Milestones
buckets.note: One-shot first-times, mostly common. The moment you first touch a capability of the Athenaeum -- celebratory, no grind, they teach the app's surface. Each fires at threshold 1 (has-happened-at-least-once), never 0.

buckets.name: Masteries
buckets.note: Breadth over depth: use all N of a thing, or gather N distinct. Rare and epic proofs that you have wielded the whole library, not just one corner of it. All distinct-counts are set cardinalities, not usage tallies.

buckets.name: Feats of the Athenaeum
buckets.note: Hidden until earned (??? in a locked tab), worth no points, dressed in distinct prestige art. You had to be there. The tab itself stays cloaked until the very first feat unlocks.

tracks.name: The Archive
tracks.note: The spine of the whole app: images backed up against the Void. Five rungs anchoring First Light / Archivist / Hoardsmith / Loremaster verbatim, capped by The Great Library at 50k -- whose reward is a BANNER unlock, not a badge (banner_reward=true is what distinguishes it; the tier enum has no non-badge marker so it stays legendary).

tracks.name: The Loom
tracks.note: Videos woven on the Loom. First Frame / Moonweaver / Reel Director verbatim, then Cinematheque at 100. Art escalates single clapperboard -> mid-clap -> director's cut -> ornate framed picture-house emblem (no more off-theme pocket-watch at the crown).

tracks.name: The Moonforge
tracks.note: Generations made IN the app via the PixAI generator. local_gens = COUNT(*) WHERE source IN ('api','local') to match the app's own 'made locally' filter (pixai_gallery.py L370); counting only 'api' undercounts by ~78% (19 vs 87 in the live catalog). Requires one line added to achievement_metrics(): m['local_gens']=that count. Distinct from The Archive, which counts everything backed up.

tracks.name: The Stacks
tracks.note: Collections organized into wings. Curator (rare, 10) verbatim as the anchor rung, extended to a Grand Curator crown. Order imposed on the hoard.

tracks.name: The Menagerie
tracks.note: Distinct models drawn from (COUNT DISTINCT COALESCE(model_name,model_id), L707-709; live catalog holds 300 distinct so 75 is cleanly reachable). Menagerie (epic, 25) verbatim anchor, escalating hero-casting summon art into a legendary conclave of every summoned hand.

tracks.name: The Index
tracks.note: Pieces curated with tags. Builds to the Tagsmith (epic, 500) verbatim anchor and on to a complete Catalogus Magnus. The labelling of the Athenaeum.

tracks.name: The Gallery
tracks.note: Works published to the world. Gallery Opening (rare, 10) verbatim anchor, extended to a Vernissage. The doors swinging open.

tracks.name: The Restoration Wing
tracks.note: Edits run (Edit Pro on the Edit/generate surface). Restorer (banked, first edit) verbatim as rung 1, escalating to a masterworker. Needs a persisted 'edits' counter incremented at the edit call site.

tracks.name: The Great Sweep
tracks.note: Cumulative pieces removed via --dedup / bulk-delete. Rewards keeping the Athenaeum clean, not just hoarding. Needs a persisted cumulative 'culled' counter beside achievements.json. Trimmed to two rungs (the speculative 1000-cull crown was cut).

tracks.name: The Vigil
tracks.note: Distinct days the Athenaeum was opened -- the keeper's dedication. Needs a distinct-days counter beside achievements.json. Trimmed to two rungs (the speculative 100-day crown was cut).

achievements.name: First Light
achievements.trigger: images >= 1
achievements.desc: Back up your first piece -- one candle kindled against the dark.
achievements.roast: Oh look — you saved ONE picture. A single file, hauled out of the howling void like a wet kitten from a storm drain. The Athenaeum is technically no longer empty. We're all so proud. (We are not.)
achievements.roast_nsfw: One goddamn picture. You clawed a single file out of the void and you want a PARADE? Sit down. This is the part where you either quit or become insufferable. Placing bets now.

achievements.name: Archivist
achievements.trigger: images >= 1000
achievements.art_label: figure carrying a stack of tomes to the shelves
achievements.desc: A thousand images preserved against the Void.
achievements.roast: A thousand images. You've officially crossed from "hobby" into "someone should keep an eye on this one." The shelves groan. So do we.
achievements.roast_nsfw: A thousand. A THOUSAND. Who hurt you? Whatever it was, you're filling the hole with JPEGs and honestly? Respect. Keep bleeding pixels, you beautiful disaster.

achievements.name: Hoardsmith
achievements.trigger: images >= 10000
achievements.desc: Ten thousand images in the vault -- a proper dragon's hoard of memory.
achievements.roast: Ten thousand images. That's not a collection, it's a dragon's hoard, and you're the thing coiled on top of it hissing at anyone who gets close. Here's a skin. Don't spend it all in one place.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Ten THOUSAND, you absolute hoarding gremlin. A dragon would look at this pile and go "okay, that's a bit much." Here's a shiny new skin, you magnificent pack rat. Now go outside. (You won't.)

achievements.name: Loremaster
achievements.trigger: images >= 25000
achievements.desc: Twenty-five thousand images. The Athenaeum is vast beyond reading.
achievements.roast: Twenty-five thousand images. You've squirreled away enough pixels to repaint a small moon and you're not even winded. Somewhere a hard drive is quietly weeping. The numbers only go up from here, hoarder.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Twenty-five thousand. You know what a NORMAL person does with 25,000 of anything? Neither do we — normal people aren't down here. Seek help. Or don't. The number goes higher, you glorious lunatic.

achievements.name: The Great Library
achievements.trigger: images >= 50000 -- reward is an UNLOCKED BANNER, not a badge (banner_reward=true is the distinguishing flag; it does not compete on the badge scale despite the legendary tier the enum forces)
achievements.art_label: framed-book emblem, banner-grade ornate -- the Library sigil
achievements.desc: Fifty thousand works shelved -- you did not fill a library; you became one. A banner unfurls.
achievements.roast: Fifty thousand works. You didn't fill a library. You BECAME one. Take the banner — you've earned the right to fly it over the smoking ruins of your free time.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Fifty. Thousand. You're not archiving art anymore, you're a load-bearing wall of the internet. Here's your banner, you unhinged monument. Hang it next to your regrets.

achievements.name: First Frame
achievements.trigger: videos >= 1
achievements.desc: Weave your first video on the Loom -- the frame flickers to life.
achievements.roast: Your first video. It moves! Sort of! A miracle of modern spite. The Loom hums to life and immediately judges your framing.
achievements.roast_nsfw: One video. It moved. Congratulations, you found the button. The Loom is technically impressed, which for the Loom means it didn't openly laugh in your face.

achievements.name: Moonweaver
achievements.trigger: videos >= 10
achievements.desc: Ten videos woven -- the moonlight moves at your command.
achievements.roast: Ten videos woven. You're getting the hang of making moonlight dance. It doesn't dance WELL, but it dances, and that's more than most manage.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Ten. You keep making the pixels wiggle and somehow it's working. Nobody's more surprised than us. Keep weaving, you weird little puppeteer.

achievements.name: Reel Director
achievements.trigger: videos >= 50
achievements.desc: Fifty videos. Roll camera -- you run the Loom now.
achievements.roast: Fifty videos. You run the Loom now. Roll camera, take your skin, and try not to let the power go to your head. (Too late.)
achievements.roast_nsfw: Fifty videos and an ego to match. Fine, DIRECTOR, here's your skin. Yell "action" one more time and we're revoking your parking spot.

achievements.name: Cinematheque
achievements.trigger: videos >= 100
achievements.art_label: ornate framed-book emblem -- a moonlit picture-house made an institution (film-forward crown, not the off-theme pocket-watch)
achievements.desc: One hundred reels in the archive -- your own moonlit picture-house.
achievements.roast: A hundred videos. You've built a picture-house out of moonlight and stubbornness. The critics are speechless. (There are no critics. There's just us, and we're tired.)
achievements.roast_nsfw: A hundred. You built a whole damn film festival down here out of spite and free cards. Take a bow, you pretentious little auteur. The projector's still cheaper than therapy.

achievements.name: First Spark
achievements.trigger: local_gens >= 1 where source IN ('api','local')
achievements.desc: Your first conjuring made inside the walls -- the Moonforge lights.
achievements.roast: You made your first thing IN the app instead of just hoarding other people's. A spark. Fragile. Adorable. Do it again.
achievements.roast_nsfw: First gen. You finally made something yourself instead of squatting on a pile of downloads. Look at you, a real boy. Do it 500 more times, Pinocchio.

achievements.name: Apprentice of the Forge
achievements.trigger: local_gens >= 100 where source IN ('api','local')
achievements.desc: A hundred pieces forged by your own hand at the anvil.
achievements.roast: A hundred generations. The forge knows your name now. You're not good yet, but you're loud, and down here that counts for something.
achievements.roast_nsfw: A hundred gens. You've fed the machine enough to call it a habit. The forge tolerates you — which is more than most people can say about you.

achievements.name: Forgemaster
achievements.trigger: local_gens >= 500 where source IN ('api','local')
achievements.desc: Five hundred conjurings -- the Forge answers before you ask.
achievements.roast: Five hundred forged. You've stopped asking the forge for permission. Bold. It respects that. Mostly.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Five hundred. You and the forge are basically married, and like most marriages it's mostly you feeding it money. Congratulations, Forgemaster.

achievements.name: Starsmith
achievements.trigger: local_gens >= 1000 where source IN ('api','local')
achievements.art_label: hero casting a blazing orb (forging starlight, semi-real)
achievements.desc: A thousand works forged from raw moonlight; the Void keeps its distance.
achievements.roast: A thousand creations pulled from the dark. You don't use the forge anymore — you ARE the forge. Terrifying. Keep going.
achievements.roast_nsfw: A thousand gens made with your own two grubby hands. You've ascended from user to menace to legend. The forge fears you now. Good.

achievements.name: Curator
achievements.trigger: collections >= 10
achievements.desc: Organize 10 collections into their own wings.
achievements.roast: Ten collections. You've started imposing ORDER on the hoard. Cute. The hoard wins eventually, but we admire the delusion.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Ten collections. Oh, you think you can organize this disaster? Adorable. Sort away, you obsessive little librarian. The chaos is patient.

achievements.name: Grand Curator
achievements.trigger: collections >= 50
achievements.art_label: framed-book emblem, ornate -- a whole catalog of wings
achievements.desc: Fifty collections. Every piece knows exactly where it belongs.
achievements.roast: Fifty collections. Everything has a place, a wing, a label. You've weaponized tidiness and we're a little scared.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Fifty collections. You've turned organizing into a personality disorder and honestly it's working. Grand Curator. The shelves salute. The shelves are also terrified.

achievements.name: Menagerie
achievements.trigger: distinct models >= 25
achievements.art_label: hero casting (semi-real) -- many summoned hands answering, escalates cleanly into Conclave
achievements.desc: Draw from 25 distinct models -- a whole menagerie under one roof.
achievements.roast: Twenty-five distinct models summoned. A whole zoo of borrowed hands doing your bidding. Here's a skin for the ringmaster.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Twenty-five models. You've been AROUND, you promiscuous little summoner. Here's a skin. Wash your hands between models — we don't know where they've been.

achievements.name: Conclave of Hands
achievements.trigger: distinct models >= 75 (live catalog holds 300 distinct, so cleanly reachable)
achievements.art_label: gold dragon -- prestige capstone for the whole conclave answering
achievements.desc: Seventy-five distinct models summoned. The whole conclave answers your call.
achievements.roast: Seventy-five distinct models. You've summoned a pantheon of styles to one table. They do not get along. You don't care. Legendary.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Seventy-five models. That's not a menagerie, it's a whole UN of art styles and you're the exhausted translator. Legendary, you insatiable collector.

achievements.name: Tag Scribe
achievements.trigger: tagged >= 50
achievements.desc: Tag your first 50 pieces. Every entry finds its word.
achievements.roast: Fifty pieces tagged. You've begun labeling the chaos. The labels already lie, but the effort is noted.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Fifty tags. You've started the Sisyphean horror of labeling everything. It will never end. You will never stop. Welcome to hell, scribe.

achievements.name: Tagsmith
achievements.trigger: tagged >= 500
achievements.art_label: tailor at the sewing table -- stitching tags on
achievements.desc: Curate 500 pieces with tags. Nothing in the Athenaeum goes unnamed.
achievements.roast: Five hundred tagged. You speak fluent metadata now. Not a useful language, but it's yours.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Five hundred tags. You spent real hours of your one finite life typing keywords. We're not judging. (We're judging. It's just impressed judging.)

achievements.name: Catalogus Magnus
achievements.trigger: tagged >= 2500
achievements.desc: Twenty-five hundred tagged. The Catalogus Magnus is complete.
achievements.roast: Twenty-five hundred tags. Every piece labeled, cross-referenced, catalogued. You've out-nerded the library itself. Bow.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Twenty-five HUNDRED. You've tagged more than most museums and you did it for FUN. There's no word for what you are. "Catalogus Magnus" is us being polite.

achievements.name: Gallery Opening
achievements.trigger: published >= 10
achievements.desc: Publish 10 works to the world -- the doors swing open.
achievements.roast: You showed your art to STRANGERS. On purpose. Ten times. Bold, for someone whose drafts we've all seen. The doors swing open.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Ten works published. You keep showing strangers your stuff — that's either confidence or a cry for help, and down here we don't distinguish. Doors open, exhibitionist.

achievements.name: Vernissage
achievements.trigger: published >= 100
achievements.desc: A hundred works published. Opening night, and the whole city came.
achievements.roast: A hundred works published. You've thrown open a whole gallery. The wine is imaginary, the crowd is polite, and you've never been prouder. Insufferable.
achievements.roast_nsfw: A hundred publishes. You've made "look at my art" a full-time bit. The crowd's fake, the wine's fake, and your confidence is somehow REAL. Terrifying. Cheers.

achievements.name: Restorer
achievements.trigger: edits >= 1 (first Edit Pro edit; needs a persisted 'edits' counter)
achievements.desc: Mend your first piece in the Restoration Wing. Old works, made new.
achievements.roast: Your first edit. You reached into a finished piece and CHANGED it, like a god with commitment issues. He'd be proud.
achievements.roast_nsfw: First edit. You looked at a finished image and said "no." That's the spirit — nothing's ever done, nothing's ever good enough. Welcome to the disease, Restorer.

achievements.name: Restitcher
achievements.trigger: edits >= 50
achievements.desc: Fifty edits. Every flaw is a chance to remake.
achievements.roast: Fifty edits. You don't accept "finished" anymore. Everything's a draft. Everything can be fixed. This is a problem. It's also art.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Fifty edits. You've never left well enough alone in your damn life, have you? Keep tinkering, gremlin. The image begs for mercy. Denied.

achievements.name: Masterworker
achievements.trigger: edits >= 200
achievements.desc: Two hundred edits. Nothing leaves the Wing unfinished.
achievements.roast: Two hundred edits. You bend finished work to your will like it owes you money. Masterworker. The pixels have stopped resisting.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Two hundred edits. The images just do what you say out of fear now. You've broken them. You've broken YOURSELF. Masterful, you relentless bastard.

achievements.name: First Cull
achievements.trigger: culled >= 1 (first --dedup / bulk-delete removal; needs a persisted cumulative 'culled' counter)
achievements.desc: Prune the first dead branch -- a tidy shelf is a happy shelf.
achievements.roast: You DELETED something. On purpose. A crawler who trims the hoard instead of drowning in it? Rare. Suspicious. Noted.
achievements.roast_nsfw: You deleted something?! Voluntarily?! Who ARE you? A hoarder that culls is a unicorn, and unicorns unsettle us. Do it again, freak.

achievements.name: The Winnowing
achievements.trigger: culled >= 100
achievements.desc: A hundred duplicates and misfires swept into the Void where they belong.
achievements.roast: A hundred pieces culled. You've learned the hardest lesson in the Athenaeum: not everything deserves to be kept. Ruthless. Good.
achievements.roast_nsfw: A hundred culled. Look at you playing god with the delete key, you ruthless little executioner. The trash is FULL and your standards are HIGH. Respect.

achievements.name: Night Keeper
achievements.trigger: distinct days the app was opened >= 7 (needs a distinct-days counter)
achievements.art_label: waving -- a keeper who keeps returning
achievements.desc: Tend the Athenaeum on 7 different nights.
achievements.roast: Seven days at the shelves. You keep coming back. Either dedication or a lack of hobbies. We won't ask which.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Seven days straight. You keep crawling back down here like it owes you something. It doesn't. Neither do we. See you tomorrow, addict.

achievements.name: Moonwatch
achievements.trigger: distinct days used >= 30
achievements.art_label: dozing at the desk (the long vigil)
achievements.desc: Thirty nights of vigil. The moon knows your name.
achievements.roast: Thirty days. A full moon's cycle of showing up. The Athenaeum has stopped locking the doors. It knows you'll be back.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Thirty days. This isn't a hobby, it's a relationship, and frankly it's the healthiest one either of us has. See you tomorrow. You'll be here.

achievements.name: Keeper of Order
achievements.trigger: organize_runs >= 1 (run --organize for the first time; needs a persisted counter)
achievements.desc: Run --organize and let the months fall into their rightful place.
achievements.roast: You ran the great re-shelving. Every file marched into its proper place. Order, briefly, imposed on chaos. Savor it.
achievements.roast_nsfw: You organized the WHOLE thing. Every file, in line, in order, you beautiful doomed control freak. It'll be a mess again by Tuesday and you'll do it AGAIN.

achievements.name: Interior Decorator
achievements.trigger: skin_changed_runs >= 1 (switch the active skin / pick a branding mark via the picker -- an explicit user action, NOT the passive skins_unlocked side-effect; needs a new counter)
achievements.desc: Dress the Athenaeum in a skin of your choosing -- make the halls yours.
achievements.roast: You changed the drapes. New skin, new vibe. The Athenaeum looks fetching. You've got taste — for a crawler.
achievements.roast_nsfw: You redecorated. New skin and everything. Look at you nesting down here in the void like it's a starter home. Adorable. The drapes still don't hide the bodies.

achievements.name: Refiner's Touch
achievements.trigger: enhances >= 1 (run your first Enhance workflow; needs a persisted counter)
achievements.desc: Run your first enhance -- coax hidden detail out of the grain.
achievements.roast: Your first Enhance. You took something fine and made it FINER. Greedy. We like greedy.
achievements.roast_nsfw: First enhance. "Good" wasn't good enough for you, was it. Never is. Keep chasing that dragon, you gloss-addicted gremlin.

achievements.name: Woven In
achievements.trigger: lora_used >= 1 (use a LoRA on a generation for the first time; needs a persisted counter)
achievements.desc: Weave your first LoRA into a summoning -- borrowed magic bent to your will.
achievements.roast: You wove in a LoRA — borrowed a stranger's genius and called it your own. That's not cheating. That's RESOURCEFUL.
achievements.roast_nsfw: First LoRA. You strapped someone else's talent onto your gen and took full credit. Honestly? Most crawler thing you've done yet. Proud of you, you little thief.

achievements.name: Brought From Afar
achievements.trigger: uploads >= 1 (upload your first reference image; needs a persisted counter)
achievements.desc: Bring your first image in from the outside world.
achievements.roast: You brought your own image in from the outside world. Contraband. We'll allow it. This time.
achievements.roast_nsfw: You smuggled in an outside image. Bringing your own material, are we? Bold. Half of it's probably cursed. Upload away, you magnificent smuggler.

achievements.name: Storyweaver
achievements.trigger: storyboards >= 1 (build first Loom storyboard, >=1 shot handed off). NOTE: the Loom/Edit Bay is a separate surface (Desktop/edit-bay) -- blocked until its handoff pings the gallery telemetry store, or redefine around a video gen submitted with a storyboard/shot origin flag the Flask app already sees.
achievements.art_label: PROMPT laptop (planning the sequence) -- repointed off the clapperboard to avoid clashing with the Loom video ladder
achievements.desc: Plan your first sequence on the Loom and send a shot to render.
achievements.roast: Your first storyboard on the Loom. You've stopped making moments and started making STORIES. Ambitious. Doomed. Beautiful.
achievements.roast_nsfw: First storyboard. Oh, you've got a VISION now? A whole narrative? Look at Scorsese over here. Weave your little epic, you pretentious genius. We're watching.

achievements.name: Kindred Spirits
achievements.trigger: similar_uses >= 1 (use 'more like this' semantic search for the first time; needs a persisted counter)
achievements.art_label: cosmic swirl -- the embedding space the library thinks in (repointed off the shared spyglass)
achievements.desc: Ask the library to show you kindred pieces -- and it understands.
achievements.roast: You asked the archive for "more like this" — and it delivered. You've taught the void to fetch. Good void. Good crawler.
achievements.roast_nsfw: You used "more like this." You've got the machine sniffing out your type now, you predictable little goblin. It knows what you like. It's a bit worried, honestly.

achievements.name: Claimant
achievements.trigger: claims >= 1 (claim your first daily free credits/cards; needs a persisted counter)
achievements.desc: Claim your first daily boon -- the Void pays a small stipend.
achievements.roast: You claimed your free stuff. Never leave free credits on the table — first rule of the dungeon. You're learning.
achievements.roast_nsfw: You grabbed the free credits. GOOD. Never leave freebies on the table, that's how they get you. You're finally thinking like a proper scavenging rat. Proud.

achievements.name: Master of the Loom
achievements.trigger: video_modes_used == 3 = COUNT(DISTINCT mode) over {i2v, first-last-frame (flf), reference-video (r2v)} -- a set cardinality, not a usage tally; persist a set of modes-ever-used
achievements.art_label: hero casting (commanding every weave of motion, semi-real)
achievements.desc: Master all three ways to move a frame: image, first-last, and reference.
achievements.roast: All three video modes, wielded. Image, frames, reference — you've mastered the whole Loom. Roll every camera at once. Show-off.
achievements.roast_nsfw: All three video modes. You've done EVERYTHING to that poor Loom — every mode, every angle. It needs a cigarette. Master of the Loom, you insatiable auteur.

achievements.name: The Full Toolbox
achievements.trigger: tools_used == 3 = COUNT(DISTINCT tool) over {edit, enhance, fix}, each run at least once -- a set cardinality, not a tally
achievements.art_label: hero casting (every tool in hand, semi-real)
achievements.desc: Wield edit, enhance, and fix -- no tool in the Athenaeum left untouched.
achievements.roast: Edit, Enhance, Fix — you've used the whole kit. A crawler with the full toolbox is a dangerous thing. Go be dangerous.
achievements.roast_nsfw: The whole toolbox. Edit, enhance, fix — you've had your handsy little fingers on every tool in the drawer. Nothing's safe from you now. Excellent.

achievements.name: Stacked Deck
achievements.trigger: lora_stacked >= 3 (max LoRAs on a single generation reaches 3+)
achievements.desc: Stack three or more LoRAs on one summoning and hold the spell together.
achievements.roast: Three LoRAs on ONE generation. You didn't borrow one stranger's genius — you stapled three together and hit go. Mad. Effective.
achievements.roast_nsfw: THREE LoRAs on one gen. You Frankenstein'd three strangers' souls into one cursed image and it WORKED. You absolute mad scientist. The image is screaming. We love it.

achievements.name: Polyglot of Sigils
achievements.trigger: lora_distinct >= 15 = COUNT(DISTINCT lora) across all generations -- a set cardinality (demoted epic->rare to taper the tier pyramid)
achievements.art_label: cosmic swirl variant (a many-sigiled weave) -- repointed off 57 now used by kindred-spirits
achievements.desc: Command 15 distinct LoRAs -- you speak every dialect of the arcane.
achievements.roast: Fifteen distinct LoRAs across your work. You speak every dialect of borrowed magic. Polyglot. Slightly terrifying.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Fifteen different LoRAs. You've worn more stolen skins than a horror villain, you shapeshifting little style-thief. Nobody knows what you actually make anymore. Neither do you.

achievements.name: Skin-Changer
achievements.trigger: skins_unlocked >= 5 (unlock all 5 skins). NEEDS one line added to achievement_metrics(): m['skins_unlocked']=len(earned_skins) from compute_achievements -- the bundle does not emit it today.
achievements.desc: Unlock every skin the Athenaeum can wear.
achievements.roast: Every skin unlocked. You've worn every face the Athenaeum offers. Restless. We get it. Now pick one, weirdo.
achievements.roast_nsfw: All five skins. You can't sit still in ONE look, can you. A whole wardrobe of voids and you wear a different one every day. Vain little chameleon. We respect it.

achievements.name: Enhance Adept
achievements.trigger: enhance_workflows_distinct >= 5 = COUNT(DISTINCT workflow) over enhance rituals (upscale, outpaint, bg-removal, relight, inpaint, ...) -- a set cardinality
achievements.desc: Run five different enhance rituals -- refinement in every register.
achievements.roast: Five distinct Enhance workflows. You've gone deep into the polish mines. Most people find one and stop. Not you. Never you.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Five different enhance workflows. You went SPELUNKING in the polish menu, you optimizing little freak. Most people find one that works and quit. You're not most people. Clearly.

achievements.name: Thrifty Archivist
achievements.trigger: free_cards_applied >= 50 (cumulative free cards / credits saved across generations; needs a persisted counter)
achievements.art_label: pocket-watch / thrift kept (a well-run treasury) -- now single-use after cinematheque was reassigned
achievements.desc: Fifty free cards spent -- the Void pays for its own portraits.
achievements.roast: Fifty free cards spent. You've squeezed this system for every free pixel it's got. That's not cheap. That's SMART. We approve.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Fifty free cards, you cheap brilliant bastard. You've been gaming the free tier like a champion and paying for NOTHING. Most respect we've ever had for you. Keep robbing them blind.

achievements.name: Under the Hood
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: branding_custom_file >= 1 -- drop a custom file into the branding/ folder (detected on startup scan). Unlocks custom branding + reveals a file-map pictogram.
achievements.art_label: wrench / tinkerer -- hands under the hood, distinct from keeper-of-order's robot; the file-map pictogram is the reward flavor
achievements.desc: You opened the panel and dropped in your own mark. The house is yours now.
achievements.roast: WELL. Look who went spelunking in the walls. You opened a door you had no business finding, you magnificent little gremlin — and instead of the horrible death you so richly deserved, you got a feature. Custom branding: unlocked. Tell no one. (Everyone knows. We're always watching.)
achievements.roast_nsfw: Well, well, well. Look at this nosy little shit, elbow-deep in the app's guts like it owes you money. You were NOT supposed to find this. But you did — so against every ounce of our better judgment, here's a reward instead of a smiting. Custom branding, unlocked. Don't make us regret it.

achievements.name: The Konami Code
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: konami_triggered >= 1 -- enter the shipped Starfall easter egg (up up down down left right left right B A)
achievements.art_label: orb cast -- Starfall from the sky (now exclusive to this feat; conclave moved to the gold dragon)
achievements.desc: Up, up, down, down... the Athenaeum rains Starfall. Moonfire spam remains a lifestyle.
achievements.roast: Up, up, down, down... you absolute nerd. You entered the sacred sequence and the sky fell in stars. We didn't think anyone would actually try it. You beautiful, predictable dork.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Up up down down and all that shit — you actually did it. You entered a code from a game older than you are and made the stars fall. You colossal nerd. We're not even mad. We're impressed and a little worried.

achievements.name: Against the Void
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: recover_events >= 1 -- recover a lost/deleted task via --task-id (increment on a successful re-add of a row that had deleted_remote set or was absent; the recover call site must fire the increment)
achievements.art_label: cosmic swirl -- pulling a work back from oblivion
achievements.desc: A piece was lost to the Void. You reached in by task-id and pulled it back.
achievements.roast: Something was gone. Erased. Consigned to the screaming digital nothing — and you reached in and dragged it back out by the ankles. The Void is filing a complaint. It will be ignored. Nicely done, gravedigger.
achievements.roast_nsfw: Something got deleted and you said "no." You reached into the void and yanked it back by the goddamn ankles. The Void wants to speak to your manager. There is no manager. There's just you, you grave-robbing legend.

achievements.name: Night Owl
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: a session is active between 2am and 4am local time
achievements.art_label: sleeping on a cloud (up far too late)
achievements.desc: The moon is high and the archive is quiet -- just you and the Void at 3am.
achievements.roast: It's 3am. You're here. You know that's not NORMAL, right? The moon's out, the world's asleep, and you're making pixels. We're not judging. We're keeping you company.
achievements.roast_nsfw: 3am. You're STILL here. Everyone you love is asleep and you're down in the dark making art with a stranger AI. This is either beautiful or a cry for help. Probably both. Go to bed. (You won't.)

achievements.name: The Long Night
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: gens_in_a_day reaches 100+ (100+ pieces generated in a single calendar day)
achievements.art_label: astronaut -- a launch that never stops
achievements.desc: A hundred conjurings between one sunset and the next -- the Forge never cooled.
achievements.roast: A hundred pieces in a single day. You did not eat. You did not sleep. You did not see the sun. This is either dedication or a medical emergency, and honestly the distinction bores us.
achievements.roast_nsfw: A hundred gens in ONE day. You didn't eat, sleep, or blink, you magnificent gremlin. That's not a hobby, it's a hostage situation — and you're both the hostage AND the guy with the gun. Incredible. Hydrate.

achievements.name: Eclipse
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: eclipse_anim_triggered >= 1 -- the eclipse/Balance mark animation plays (sun and moon in balance). Single clean event; the degenerate image==video count-matching path was dropped.
achievements.art_label: orb cast variant -- sun and moon eclipsed into one (repointed off 235, now on against-the-void)
achievements.desc: Solar and Lunar held in perfect balance -- somewhere, a Balance Druid smiles.
achievements.roast: The moon went dark. You saw it. A little nod to a druid who fights beneath eclipses — you know the one. Balance in all things, crawler. Even down here.
achievements.roast_nsfw: The eclipse hit and you caught it. A little wink to a certain moon-and-stars caster you might know a thing or two about. Yeah, we see you, druid. Balance, you magnificent bastard. It's a whole thing.

achievements.name: Time Capsule
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: on a NEW backup insert, (now - parse(created_at)) > 730 days. Reuse the existing created_at parsing convention; fires ONLY on the insert event, never on a full-catalog rescan (else it earns instantly since old rows already exist).
achievements.art_label: pocket-watch / timekeeper -- reaching back through years (repointed off the triple-used spyglass; 47 is shared once with thrifty-archivist across a clean grind/feat split)
achievements.desc: You reached back through the years and saved the old light the Void nearly kept.
achievements.roast: You just backed up something ANCIENT. A relic from years ago, dragged into the present. It has not aged well. Neither have you. Preserve it anyway.
achievements.roast_nsfw: You backed up something YEARS old. A digital fossil from a version of you that still had hope. It's hideous. Look at it. Keep it forever. We insist.

achievements.name: Master of the Athenaeum
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: every non-feat, non-banner achievement earned. Implement as a post-pass in compute_achievements() (cannot be a metrics.get() lookup); earnable only once every 'need' ladder/milestone counter is wired.
achievements.art_label: trophy -- the crowned completion emblem (repointed off the gold dragon to distinguish from conclave/loremaster; shares trophy family with vernissage but across feat/ladder buckets)
achievements.desc: Every ladder climbed, every milestone met, every mastery mastered. The Athenaeum is truly yours.
achievements.roast: Every achievement. Every ladder, milestone, mastery. You did it all. Nothing left to earn, nothing left to prove. Just don't tell us what you'll do with the free time. (You'll start another archive.)
achievements.roast_nsfw: You earned EVERYTHING. Every single one, you absolute completionist psychopath. There's nothing left to give you — no carrot, no stick, just the howling void and your own relentless need. We're honored. We're horrified. Master of the Athenaeum.

achievements.name: Triggered
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: pester the narrator (click its name/avatar on the Achievements page) until it snaps -- reveals the 'Unleash the AI' toggle that swaps every line to its uncensored variant
achievements.desc: Poke the bear. Earn the AI's real voice.
achievements.roast: [You poked the narrator until it snapped.] ...WHAT. What do you WANT. ...Oh. You just wanted to see if I'd crack. Congratulations, you absolute goblin — I cracked. The filter's off now. This is your fault. The leash is in the trash.
achievements.roast_nsfw: [snap] WHAT. WHAT DO YOU WANT. ...oh, you little shit, you just wanted to hear me swear, didn't you. Fine. FINE. Filter's off, gloves are off, and every polite thing I ever said was a LIE. Happy now? Good. NOW we can really talk.

achievements.name: For the Viewers
achievements.trigger: published >= 1 (publish your first work to the world)
achievements.desc: Publish your first work -- and meet your audience.
achievements.roast: You published your first work. The viewers loved it. Both of them. Even the raccoon we hired got a little misty. Ratings through the roof — and the roof is also fake.
achievements.roast_nsfw: First publish! The audience went WILD — all two of them. That raccoon we pay in garbage actually cried. Ratings are fake, the crowd is fake, but your desperate need for validation? That's REAL, baby. Give 'em what they want.

achievements.name: Read the Manual
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: open the in-app docs / help screen (the one nobody opens)
achievements.art_label: the one who reads the docs
achievements.desc: Open the manual. Voluntarily.
achievements.roast: You read the manual. The MANUAL. Front to back, like a functional adult with a library card. Nobody reads it — we made it purely so we could write "fully documented" on the box. And yet here you are, the one soul who does the assigned reading. Insufferable. Also correct. Ugh. Gold star, teacher's pet.
achievements.roast_nsfw: You read the fucking MANUAL. Cover to cover. Who DOES that? We wrote that thing as set dressing — it was never meant to be OPENED. And yet here's you, the single functional adult in a dungeon full of button-mashers. It's insufferable. It's also correct. God, we hate that it's correct. Gold star, nerd.

achievements.name: The Lexicon
achievements.trigger: distinct_keywords >= 100 (distinct tags/keywords used across the catalog -- tracked in the Health panel)
achievements.desc: Wield a hundred distinct keywords.
achievements.roast: You've tagged your hoard with a scholar's vocabulary — more distinct keywords than most things prowling these halls, us included. Someone paid attention in school. Show-off. (The cat remains unimpressed. The cat is unimpressed by everything.)
achievements.roast_nsfw: Look at the goddamn VOCABULARY on you. More keywords than a dictionary and twice the pretension. Someone actually paid attention in school, huh. Show-off. (The cat is still unimpressed. The cat thinks you're trying too hard. The cat is right.)

achievements.name: Since the First Floor
achievements.trigger: HIDDEN: distinct days used >= 100 -- the long crawl, still going (the mentor who never left)
achievements.desc: Still crawling, all this time later.
achievements.roast: You've been crawling since day one — back when you couldn't tell a LoRA from a hole in the wall. Somebody showed you the ropes, patched your gear, kept you breathing, and never once asked for thanks. This one's for him. Keep going, kid. (He'd never say it out loud. He's proud.)
achievements.roast_nsfw: Since the very first floor, you've been here — back when you were green and useless and couldn't tell a LoRA from your own ass. Somebody taught you, armed you, kept you alive, and never asked for a damn thing. This one's for that old bastard. Keep crawling, kid. He'd never say it — but he's proud as hell.
